class.name: ASAttributeSet
class.brief_description: Resource managing a collection of attributes and unlocked abilities.
class.description: [ASAttributeSet] defines which attributes an actor has and which abilities are permitted for use (unlocked).

method.name: add_attribute_definition
method.description: Adds an attribute definition to the set.

method.name: add_modifier
method.description: Adds a modifier to an attribute's current value.

method.name: get_attribute_base_value
method.description: Returns the base value of the specified attribute.

method.name: get_attribute_definition
method.description: Returns the definition of the specified attribute.

method.name: get_attribute_list
method.description: Returns a list of all attribute names in the set.

method.name: get_attribute_value
method.description: Returns the current value of the specified attribute.

method.name: has_attribute
method.description: Returns true if the set contains the specified attribute.

method.name: remove_attribute_definition
method.description: Removes an attribute definition from the set by its tag name.

method.name: remove_modifier
method.description: Removes a previously applied modifier from an attribute.

method.name: set_attribute_base_value
method.description: Sets the base value for a specific attribute.

members.member: List of rules that drive an attribute value based on another (e.g., Strength driving Attack).
Abilities permitted for use by the actor.
